hero.title: Our Medical Cleaning Services
hero.subtitle: We provide regimented training and strict cleaning practices to ensure your facility meets the highest healthcare standards in Florida.

servicesList.title: Terminal Cleaning
servicesList.description: Deep disinfection of surgical suites and patient rooms following discharge to ensure 100% sterilization.

servicesList.title: Medical Floor Care
servicesList.description: Specialized stripping, waxing, and restoration of medical-grade flooring to maintain hygiene and shine.

servicesList.title: Virucide & Germicide Cleaning
servicesList.description: All surfaces are treated with hospital-grade disinfectants to eliminate pathogens and viruses.

servicesList.title: Restroom Sanitization
servicesList.description: Rigorous cleaning of high-touch areas to prevent cross-contamination in public and private clinics.

callToAction.title: Ready for a cleaner, safer facility?
callToAction.subtitle: Our methods rely on strict training. Chrome should shine, and hard-to-reach areas are never an excuse for dust.
